description: User who journals about relationships and asks about social life

memory_chunks.content: Had coffee with Sarah for the first time in months. It felt awkward at first but we ended up talking for three hours. I miss having close friendships like that.
My relationship with my brother has been strained lately. We argued over our parents' health situation and haven't spoken since. I don't know how to bridge it.
Met someone interesting at the book club tonight. We ended up talking the whole time instead of discussing the book. Got their number — might grab lunch.
Feeling lonely lately. Work from home means I go days without real human interaction. Need to be more intentional about making plans with people.

query: How has my social life and relationships been lately?
